get.description: Fetch current account balance for all currencies or a specific currency

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Filter by specific currency code (XOF, USD, EUR)

get.description: Fetch detailed balance breakdown including available, pending, and total balances. Optionally convert to a target currency.

parameters.name: target_currency
parameters.description: Target currency for conversion (XOF, USD, EUR)

get.description: Check if merchant has sufficient available balance in specified currency

404.description: Account not found

get.description: Returns the authenticated merchant's organization details
Get comprehensive metrics including MRR, ARR, LTV, revenue, and customer counts. All metrics are pre-calculated and stored in the database.
Returns organization details by ID (must match authenticated organization)

404.description: Organization not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all transactions for the authenticated merchant's organization with advanced filtering options. Transactions are created by the system when payments are processed.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter transactions up to this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter transactions from this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: paymentMethod
parameters.description: Filter by payment method code (comma-separated for multiple)

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Filter by currency code (comma-separated for multiple)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type (comma-separated for multiple)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by transaction status (comma-separated for multiple)

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific transaction. Only accessible if the transaction belongs to your organization.

404.description: Transaction not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all customers for the authenticated merchant's organization. Supports filtering by search term, customer type, and activity status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by activity status (active = has transactions, inactive = no transactions)

post.description: Creates a new customer in your organization. The customer will be automatically linked to your organization.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific customer. Only accessible if the customer belongs to your organization.

404.description: Customer not found or access denied

patch.description: Updates an existing customer. Only customers belonging to your organization can be updated. All fields are optional.

404.description: Customer not found or access denied

delete.description: Soft deletes a customer. The customer will be marked as deleted but not removed from the database. Only customers belonging to your organization can be deleted.

404.description: Customer not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all transactions for a specific customer. Only accessible if the customer belongs to your organization.

404.description: Customer not found or access denied

post.description: Creates a payment request for a customer. Payment requests have an expiration date and can be tracked until completion or expiry.

get.description: Returns all payment requests for your organization with pagination and optional filtering by status and customer.

200.description: List of payment requests with pagination

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific payment request, including its current status and payment details.

404.description: Payment request not found or access denied

get.summary: Get a payment request by ID

post.description: Creates a refund via the Wave edge function. Response shape is provider JSON.

201.description: Refund result (JSON body from Wave edge function)

get.description: Returns all products for the authenticated merchant's organization. Products include embedded prices and fees. Use this to display your product catalog or integrate with external systems.

200.description: List of products with embedded prices

post.description: Creates a new product with one or more prices. The product and all prices are created atomically - if any part fails, the entire operation is rolled back. At least one price is required. The first price (or the one marked as is_default) will be the default price.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific product, including all prices and fees. Only accessible if the product belongs to your organization.

404.description: Product not found or access denied

post.description: Adds an additional price option to an existing product. Useful for offering multiple pricing tiers, currencies, or billing intervals. Note: A product can have a maximum of 3 active prices. You cannot modify existing prices - create a new one instead.

400.description: Invalid input or maximum prices exceeded

404.description: Product not found or access denied

post.summary: Add a new price to a product

post.description: Sets a specific price as the default for a product. The default price is used when a customer doesn't specify a price ID in checkout. Only one price can be the default at a time - setting a new default automatically unsets the previous one.

404.description: Product or price not found

post.summary: Set a price as the default

get.description: Returns all subscriptions for the authenticated merchant's organization. Subscriptions are automatically created when customers make recurring payments.
Returns all subscriptions for a specific customer. Only accessible if the customer belongs to your organization.

404.description: Customer not found or access denied

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific subscription. Only accessible if the subscription belongs to your organization.

404.description: Subscription not found or access denied

post.description: Cancels an active subscription. This is the ONLY modification allowed on subscriptions. Price, billing dates, and other fields are system-managed and cannot be changed.

404.description: Subscription not found or access denied

get.description: Returns all discount coupons for the authenticated merchant's organization.

post.description: Creates a new discount coupon in your organization. The coupon code will be automatically uppercased.

400.description: Invalid input data or coupon code already exists

get.description: Returns performance metrics for a specific discount coupon, including usage statistics and revenue impact.

404.description: Discount coupon not found or access denied

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific discount coupon. Only accessible if the coupon belongs to your organization.

404.description: Discount coupon not found or access denied

post.description: Creates a hosted payment page for customers to complete their purchase. The checkout session expires after 60 minutes by default. Returns a session ID and URL to redirect your customer to.

requestBody.description: Checkout session payload. Either set `amount` (+ optional product fields) or `line_items` for multi-product carts.

get.description: Returns all checkout sessions for your organization with pagination and optional status filtering.
Returns detailed information about a specific checkout session, including its current status and associated customer/product details.

404.description: Checkout session not found or access denied

get.summary: Get a checkout session by ID

post.description: Creates a shareable payment link. Can be for a specific product (product link) or a custom amount (instant link). Product links reference a product and optional price. Instant links have a fixed amount.

get.description: Returns all payment links for your organization with pagination and optional filtering by type and active status.

200.description: List of payment links with pagination

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific payment link, including its URL, configuration, and status.

404.description: Payment link not found or access denied

get.summary: Get a payment link by ID

post.description: Creates a payout via the Wave edge function. Response shape is provider JSON.

201.description: Payout initiated (JSON body from Wave edge function)

post.description: Initiates a payout to a beneficiary (contractor, supplier, employee, etc.). Returns immediately with pending status. The actual payout is processed asynchronously by the payment provider (Wave, SPI). Status updates are sent via webhooks. Use this for paying external parties from your account balance.

201.description: Beneficiary payout initiated successfully with pending status

get.description: Returns all beneficiary payouts for your organization with pagination and optional filtering by status, date range, and currency.

200.description: List of beneficiary payouts with pagination

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific beneficiary payout, including its current status and provider details.

404.description: Beneficiary payout not found or access denied

get.summary: Get a beneficiary payout by ID

get.description: Returns delivery logs for a specific webhook. Logs are automatically created when webhooks are delivered. Use webhookId query parameter to filter by webhook.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of logs to skip (for pagination)

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific webhook delivery log. Only accessible if the log belongs to your organization.

404.description: Webhook delivery log not found or access denied

get.summary: Get webhook delivery log by ID

200.description: The webhook has been successfully updated.

post.description: Endpoint for Wave to send payment notifications. Verifies signature and processes events.
Endpoint for Stripe to send payment notifications. Verifies signature and processes events.

201.description: Charge initiated successfully (JSON body from Wave edge function)

400.description: Invalid input or Wave API error

info.title: lomi. API
info.description: Payment processing API for francophone West African businesses.

balance.description: Account balance in the specified currency

is_spi_account.description: Whether this is an SPI (UEMOA) account

spi_account_number.description: SPI account number in the bank system

spi_account_balance.description: Actual balance in the SPI bank account

spi_account_balance_synced_at.description: When the SPI balance was last synced

spi_account_balance_sync_error.description: Error message if SPI balance sync failed

pin_code.description: Organization PIN code for sensitive operations

is_starter_business.description: Whether this is a starter business

mrr.description: Monthly Recurring Revenue in default currency

arr.description: Annual Recurring Revenue in default currency

currency_code.description: Currency code for all monetary values

price_id.description: Price ID used for this transaction

is_bnpl.description: Whether this is a Buy Now Pay Later transaction

is_pos.description: Whether this is a POS (Point of Sale) transaction

updated_at.description: When the transaction was last updated

organization_id.description: Organization ID the customer belongs to

is_business.description: Whether the customer is a business

updated_at.description: When the customer was last updated

is_default.description: Whether this is the default price

updated_at.description: When the price was last updated

failed_payment_action.description: Action to take on failed payment

updated_at.description: When the product was last updated

price_id.description: Price ID used for this subscription

updated_at.description: When the subscription was last updated

organization_id.description: Organization ID the coupon belongs to

discount_fixed_amount.description: Fixed discount amount (if discount_type is fixed)

customer_type.description: Customer type this coupon applies to

is_active.description: Whether the coupon is currently active

max_uses.description: Maximum number of times this coupon can be used

current_uses.description: Current number of times this coupon has been used

applies_to_product_types.description: Product types this coupon applies to

updated_at.description: When the coupon was last updated

event_type.description: Event type that triggered the webhook

response_body.description: Response body from the webhook endpoint

success.description: Whether the webhook delivery was successful

ip_address.description: IP address of the webhook endpoint

user_agent.description: User agent from the webhook response

headers.description: Request headers sent with the webhook

amount.description: Transaction amount in centimes (for SPI webhooks)

spi_event_code.description: SPI webhook event code (for SPI webhooks)
